features.title: Why Traders Choose SimplifyPro
features.subtitle: Built by traders, for traders. Every feature is designed to give you an unfair advantage in the markets.

liveSignals.title: 100% Non-Repaint Signals
liveSignals.description: Unlike most indicators that secretly change past signals to look accurate, SimplifyPro signals are final. Once a buy or sell arrow appears on your chart, it never moves or disappears. What you see is what happened — in real time.

realTimeAlerts.title: Alerts on Phone, PC & Email
realTimeAlerts.description: Never miss a trade again. Set up TradingView alerts and get notified instantly on your phone, desktop, or by email every time a buy or sell signal appears — even when you're away from your screen.

clearSignals.title: Clear Buy/Sell Signals
clearSignals.description: No ambiguity. Our indicator highlights precise entry and exit points with color-coded arrows directly on your chart. Green arrow = buy. Red arrow = sell.

anyMarket.title: Works on Any Market
anyMarket.description: Indices, forex, crypto, stocks, commodities — SimplifyPro adapts to any asset class and any timeframe seamlessly.

noExperience.title: No Experience Needed
noExperience.description: Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned trader, our plug-and-play indicator requires zero configuration.

affiliateProgram.title: Earn by Sharing

tradingview.title: Never Miss a Signal Again

testimonials.title: What Traders Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from real traders using SimplifyPro every day.

items.name: James R.
items.content: I was skeptical at first, like with every indicator. But after 3 weeks on demo, I subscribed. The signals are clean, no repaint, and the alerts save me from sitting in front of my screen all day. Easily the best money I spend each month.

items.name: Léa M.
items.content: I used to rely on 4-5 free indicators stacked on top of each other. SimplifyPro replaced all of them. My charts are cleaner, my entries are better, and I finally stopped second-guessing myself on EUR/USD.

items.name: Tom K.
items.content: Not going to lie, it doesn't catch every move — no indicator does. But the win rate is solid and the risk/reward on the signals is usually 1:2 or better. That's all I need to be profitable on BTC and ETH.

items.name: Priya S.
items.content: I had zero experience with trading when I started. The green and red arrows made it so simple to understand entries and exits. The video tutorials helped a lot too. I'm not rich yet, but I'm learning and actually making consistent small gains.

items.name: Daniel W.
items.content: What I appreciate most is the daily performance page. They show every signal, including the losses. That level of transparency is rare in this industry. The indicator itself is solid on 15min and 1H for indices.

items.name: Ana C.
items.content: I was paying $150/month for another premium indicator that gave me the same results as free ones. Switched to SimplifyPro at $49 and my results actually improved. The alerts on my phone are a game changer for swing trading.

guarantee.subtext: Not satisfied? Get a full refund within 14 days of your first payment. No questions asked.

promo.label: Have a promo code?

trial.question: How does the 7-day free trial work?
trial.answer: Sign up with your credit card — you won't be charged during the trial. If you cancel before 7 days, you pay nothing. Your trial starts when we activate your TradingView access (within 12 hours), so you get the full 7 days.

afterTrial.question: What happens after my trial ends?
afterTrial.answer: Your card is automatically charged $49/mo or $349/year depending on your chosen plan. You can cancel anytime before the trial ends to avoid any charge.

guarantee.question: Is there a money-back guarantee?
guarantee.answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee after your first payment. If you're not satisfied with SimplifyPro, contact us within 14 days of being charged and we'll issue a full refund — no questions asked.

cancel.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancel.answer: Yes. Cancel from your dashboard in one click. You'll keep access until the end of your billing period. No cancellation fees, no hassle.

beginners.question: Is SimplifyPro suitable for beginners?
beginners.answer: Absolutely. SimplifyPro is designed to be simple: green arrows mean buy, red arrows mean sell. No complex setup needed. We also provide video tutorials and step-by-step guides to get you started.

freeIndicators.question: How is SimplifyPro different from free TradingView indicators?
freeIndicators.answer: Free indicators typically use basic signals (RSI, MACD) that generate a lot of noise and false signals. SimplifyPro uses a proprietary algorithm that filters out market noise and only shows high-probability entry and exit points. Our daily performance page shows real, transparent results.

access.question: How do I get access to the indicator on TradingView?
access.answer: After signing up, provide your TradingView username. Our team will grant you invite-only access within 12 hours. You'll receive an email confirmation as soon as it's activated.

markets.question: What markets and timeframes does SimplifyPro support?
markets.answer: SimplifyPro works on any market — Indices (Nasdaq, S&P 500, DAX), Forex (EUR/USD, GBP/USD), Crypto (Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana), Stocks, and Commodities (Gold, Oil). It works on all timeframes from 1 minute to monthly.

mobile.question: Can I use SimplifyPro on my phone?
mobile.answer: Yes! Since SimplifyPro runs on TradingView, you can use it on TradingView's mobile app. You can also set up push notification alerts so you never miss a signal, even when you're away from your desk.

switchPlan.question: Can I switch between monthly and annual plans?
switchPlan.answer: Yes. You can upgrade from monthly to annual at any time from your dashboard. The price difference will be prorated. You can also downgrade from annual to monthly at the end of your billing cycle.

advice.question: Is this financial advice?
advice.answer: No. SimplifyPro is a technical analysis tool. It does not constitute financial advice. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Always trade responsibly, manage your risk, and never trade with money you can't afford to lose.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By accessing or using SimplifyPro ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use the Service.

section2.title: 2. Service Description
section2.content: SimplifyPro provides a trading indicator for use on the TradingView platform. The indicator generates buy and sell signals based on technical analysis. SimplifyPro is a tool, not financial advice. You are solely responsible for your trading decisions.

section3.title: 3. Subscription and Payment
section3.content: SimplifyPro offers two subscription plans: Monthly at $49/month and Annual at $349/year. All new subscriptions include a 7-day free trial. A valid credit card is required to start the trial. You will be charged automatically at the end of the trial period unless you cancel before it ends.

section4.title: 4. Cancellation and Refunds
section4.content: You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. Upon cancellation, you will retain access to the Service until the end of your current billing period. No partial refunds are provided for unused time within a billing cycle.

section5.title: 5. TradingView Access
section5.content: Access to the SimplifyPro indicator on TradingView is granted via invite-only permissions. After subscribing, an administrator will manually grant you access within 12 hours. You must provide your TradingView username during signup.

section6.title: 6. User Responsibilities
section6.content: You agree to provide accurate information during registration, maintain the security of your account, not share your TradingView access with third parties, and use the Service in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations.

section7.title: 7. Disclaimer of Warranties
section7.content: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any trading signals generated by the indicator.

section8.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
section8.content: In no event shall SimplifyPro, its owners, employees, or affiliates be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Service, including but not limited to trading losses.

section9.title: 9. Changes to Terms
section9.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Continued use of the Service after any modifications constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

section10.title: 10. Age Requirement
section10.content: You must be at least 18 years old to use SimplifyPro. By creating an account, you confirm that you are of legal age to enter into a binding agreement and to engage in trading activities in your jurisdiction.

section11.title: 11. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
section11.content: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of France. Any disputes arising from or relating to these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Paris, France. If you are accessing the Service from outside France, you are responsible for compliance with your local laws.

section12.title: 12. Right of Withdrawal (EU)
section12.content: If you are a consumer residing in the European Union, you have the right to withdraw from your subscription within 14 days of your initial purchase, without giving any reason. To exercise this right, contact us at yoann@simplify-pro.com. If you have actively used the Service during the withdrawal period, a proportional amount may be charged for the service received. This right of withdrawal does not apply to the free trial period.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: We collect the following personal information when you create an account or subscribe to SimplifyPro: your name, email address, and TradingView username. Payment information (credit card details) is collected and processed securely by Stripe — we never store your payment details on our servers.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: Your information is used to provide and maintain the Service, process payments and manage subscriptions, grant access to the TradingView indicator, send transactional emails (subscription confirmations, receipts, access notifications), and improve the Service through anonymized analytics.

section3.title: 3. Data Sharing
section3.content: We share your data only with the following trusted third-party services: Stripe for payment processing, Resend for transactional email delivery, and PostHog for anonymized product analytics. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with any other third parties.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information. All data is transmitted over encrypted connections (HTTPS). However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You may request a copy of your data or ask us to delete your account by contacting us at yoann@simplify-pro.com. We will respond to your request within 30 days.

section6.title: 6. Cookies and Analytics
section6.content: We use PostHog for product analytics to understand how users interact with our platform. PostHog may use cookies or similar technologies to collect anonymized usage data. You can opt out of analytics tracking through your browser settings.

section7.title: 7. Contact
section7.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us at yoann@simplify-pro.com.

section8.title: 8. GDPR Compliance (European Users)
section8.content: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), your personal data is processed in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). Legal basis for processing: contract performance (providing the Service), legitimate interest (improving the Service), and consent (marketing communications). Your data may be transferred to third-party processors located outside the EEA (Stripe in the USA, Resend in the USA, PostHog in the USA). These transfers are protected by Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission. You have the right to: access your data, rectify inaccurate data, erase your data ("right to be forgotten"), restrict processing, data portability, and object to processing. To exercise any of these rights, contact our Data Protection contact at yoann@simplify-pro.com. If you believe your rights have been violated, you may lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

section9.title: 9. Data Retention
section9.content: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the Service. After account deletion, we may retain certain data for up to 12 months to comply with legal obligations (tax, accounting) and to resolve disputes. Payment records are retained by Stripe according to their own retention policy.

section1.title: Not Financial Advice
section1.content: SimplifyPro is a technical analysis tool and does NOT provide financial advice. Nothing on this website or within the SimplifyPro indicator should be construed as a recommendation to buy, sell, or hold any financial instrument. All trading signals are generated by algorithms and are for informational purposes only.

section2.title: Risk Warning
section2.content: Trading involves significant risk of loss. Forex, cryptocurrencies, stocks, and other financial instruments are highly volatile and may not be suitable for all investors. You should carefully consider your financial situation and risk tolerance before engaging in any trading activity. Only trade with money you can afford to lose.

section3.title: No Guarantees
section3.content: Past performance is not indicative of future results. Any examples of past trades, performance metrics, or win rates shown on this website are for illustrative purposes only. There is no guarantee that you will achieve similar results. Markets are unpredictable and no trading system can eliminate risk entirely.

section4.title: User Responsibility
section4.content: You are solely responsible for your own trading decisions and their outcomes. SimplifyPro, its owners, employees, and affiliates are not responsible for any losses you may incur as a result of using the indicator. By using the Service, you acknowledge that you understand the risks involved in trading.

section5.title: Regulatory Notice
section5.content: SimplifyPro is not a registered broker-dealer, investment advisor, or financial institution. We are not regulated by any financial authority. The Service is provided as an educational and analytical tool. If you require financial advice, please consult a qualified and licensed financial professional.

guide1.title: How to Install SimplifyPro on TradingView
guide1.description: A complete step-by-step guide to adding SimplifyPro V6.3 to your TradingView charts in under 5 minutes.

steps.title: Open TradingView
steps.content: Go to tradingview.com and log in to your account. If you don't have one, create a free account first.

steps.title: Open the Indicators Panel
steps.content: Click on the 'Indicators' button at the top of your chart, or use the shortcut key '/' to open the search.

steps.title: Search for SimplifyPro
steps.content: In the search bar, type 'SimplifyPro V6.3'. Since it's an invite-only indicator, it will appear under 'Invite-Only Scripts'.

steps.title: Add to Chart
steps.content: Click on 'SimplifyPro V6.3' to add it to your chart. The indicator will appear with buy (green) and sell (red) arrows.

steps.title: Configure Your Preferences
steps.content: Click the settings icon next to the indicator name to customize colors, timeframes, and alert settings.

steps.title: Start Trading
steps.content: You're all set! Follow the green arrows for buy signals and red arrows for sell signals. Remember to always manage your risk.

guide2.title: Understanding Buy & Sell Signals
guide2.description: Learn how to read and act on SimplifyPro's arrow signals for better trading decisions.

steps.title: Green Arrows = Buy Signal
steps.content: When you see a green arrow pointing up below a candle, it indicates a potential buying opportunity. The signal is strongest when it appears near a support level.

steps.title: Red Arrows = Sell Signal
steps.content: A red arrow pointing down above a candle indicates a potential selling opportunity. Look for confirmation from the overall trend direction.

steps.title: Signal Strength
steps.content: Not all signals are equal. Signals that align with the overall trend are more reliable. Use higher timeframes to identify the trend, then trade signals on lower timeframes.

steps.title: When to Avoid Signals
steps.content: Avoid trading signals during major news events, in choppy/sideways markets, or when the signal goes against the higher timeframe trend.

guide3.title: Setting Up Alerts for SimplifyPro Signals
guide3.description: Never miss a trading signal — set up automatic alerts on TradingView.

steps.title: Right-Click on the Indicator
steps.content: On your chart, right-click on the SimplifyPro indicator and select 'Add Alert'.

steps.title: Configure Alert Condition
steps.content: Set the condition to trigger when SimplifyPro generates a new buy or sell signal.

steps.title: Choose Notification Method
steps.content: Select how you want to be notified: push notification (mobile), email, or webhook.

steps.title: Set Alert Name
steps.content: Give your alert a clear name like 'SimplifyPro EUR/USD Buy Signal' so you can identify it quickly.

steps.title: Activate and Monitor
steps.content: Click 'Create' to activate the alert. You'll receive notifications whenever a new signal appears on your chart.

success.title: You're All Set!
success.subtitle: Your payment method has been saved. Your 7-day free trial begins once we grant your TradingView access (within 12 hours).

success.step2: You'll receive an email confirmation when access is granted
